zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Harbourne於大約1525年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾朗 馬爾斯頓時，她的父親Thomas Harburne II39歲，母親Mrs, Harburne36歲。她於大約1545年與John Tomes在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾朗 馬爾斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1588年在她的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Harbourne于大约1525年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾朗 馬爾斯頓时，她的父亲Thomas Harburne II39岁，母亲Mrs, Harburne36岁。她于大约1545年与John Tomes在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾朗 馬爾斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1588年在她的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Harbourne was born about 1525, in Long Marston, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Thomas Harburne II, was 39 and her mother, Mrs, Harburne, was 36. She married John Tomes about 1545, in Long Marston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1588, in her hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Harbourne est née environ 1525, à Long Marston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Harburne II, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mrs, Harburne, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John Tomes environ 1545, à Long Marston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1588, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Harbourne um 1525 in Long Marston, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Harburne II 39 und ihre Mutter Mrs, Harburne 36. Sie hat um 1545 in Long Marston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom John Tomes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1588 im Alter von 64 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Harbourneが約1525年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアロング マーストンで生まれた時，父Thomas Harburne IIは39歳，母Mrs, Harburneは36歳であった。約1545年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアロング マーストンでJohn Tomesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1588年に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Harbourne(이)가 대략 1525년 영국 그루스스터실르 론그 마스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Harburne II(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs, Harburne(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 론그 마스턴에서 John Tomes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1588년 그녀의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Harbourne nasceu aproximadamente 1525, em Long Marston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Harburne II, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mrs, Harburne, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John Tomes aproximadamente 1545, em Long Marston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Harbourne родилась около 1525 г. в местности лонг марстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Harburne II было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs, Harburne, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Tomes около 1545 г. в местности лонг марстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1588 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

Se casó con John Tomes aproximadamente 1545, en Long Marston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1588, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
